title: ACP Agents
subtitle: Manage ACP-compatible agents for FlowChat sessions.

json.title: Raw JSON
json.description: Advanced editor for the acpClients config. Each client is spawned over stdio by the desktop app.

registry.title: Agents
registry.description: Installed agents appear in the workspace action menu. Remote workspaces reuse the same list and check the remote host before showing status.
registry.partialDetail: The CLI is ready, but the ACP adapter is not configured.
registry.cliMissingDetail: No CLI command was found on PATH.
registry.acpMissingDetail: The ACP adapter is not available yet.
registry.pathInvalidDetail: The command path could not be resolved.
registry.versionMismatchDetail: The detected version does not match the expected runtime.
registry.connectionFailedDetail: The remote host could not be reached.
registry.permissionDeniedDetail: The command could not run because of a permission problem.
registry.configInvalidDetail: The current ACP configuration cannot be used as-is.

remote.title: Remote Servers
remote.description: Saved SSH servers reuse the same ACP agent list and probe each remote host automatically.
remote.noAgents: Add an ACP agent before checking remote servers.

notifications.downloadFailed: Failed to download ACP agent CLI
